name: Mayne Pharma Group Limited
analysis: MYX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 64% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.3600, stop A$2.1780, target A$2.6100 (1.37:1) — then trail it.
